case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MARCEY ANN KEISER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEISER, MARCEY ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET, UNIT 220, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ; COPY IN SASE.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KEISER, MARCEY ANN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED APR-20-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT KEISER, MARCEY ANN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KEISER, MARCEY ANN
